name: av_5a0c48b9-e457-48d7-ad61-33b5a6c91e34
prompt: The video begins with a view from inside a vehicle, looking out through the windshield at a quiet intersection. The road markings clearly indicate a stop sign ahead, with the word "STOP" painted on the asphalt. Several cars are present, including a white SUV and a black sedan, positioned at various points across the intersection. The surrounding area is lush with green trees and a hill in the background under a clear blue sky. A "YIELD" sign appears before a "STOP" sign, both prominently displayed on the right side of the intersection. The reflection of a nearby road object is visible on the bonnet of the ego vehicle, indicating the shininess of the surface. The scene appears calm and orderly.  As the video progresses, the ego vehicle moves forward and gradually comes to a stop near the intersection. The white SUV begins to move forward, crossing the intersection while the black sedan remains stationary. The camera's perspective shifts slightly, revealing more of the road and surroundings, including additional vehicles and road signs. The "STOP" and "YIELD" signs remain prominent throughout the sequence, emphasizing the traffic control measures in place. The "STOP" sign, which was initially in the frame, eventually moves out of the visible frame as the ego vehicle inches forward. The lush greenery and clear sky continue to frame the scene, maintaining the tranquil suburban atmosphere.  By the final frame, the white SUV has completed its movement across the intersection, and the black sedan remains in its position. The ego vehicle is preparing to make a right turn at an intersection with an all-way stop sign on the right side of the road. The yellow and black colored traffic sign with the text "AHEAD" is seen at the end. The overall scene continues to depict a peaceful, well-maintained suburban environment with minimal traffic activity.
